data.title: Aberdeen Investments U.S. Closed-End Funds Announce Distribution Payment Details
data.description: On May 29, 2026, the Aberdeen Investments U.S. Closed-End Funds collectively known as ASGI, THQ, and THW, declared distributions. The distributions were paid on a per share basis to all shareholders.

data.title: indie Announces New Employee Inducement Grants
data.description: A California-based automotive solutions company, indie Semiconductor (Nasdaq: INDI), revealed the issuance of equity awards, termed as "Inducement Grants", within the purview of its 2023 Inducement Incentive Plan. These awards were bestowed upon fresh recruits who recently became part of the indie team. The Compensation Committee of indie Semiconductor's Board of Directors had sanctioned these grants. Further insights on these equity awards can be accessed through the corporate investor relations page at https://investors.ind.

data.title: Aspen Snowmass Remains Open for Business During Temporary Aspen/Pitkin County Airport Closure in Summer 2027
data.description: In light of the temporary closure of Aspen/Pitkin County Airport (ASE) next summer, Aspen Snowmass along with the local businesses, lodging properties, restaurants, and event venues will continue to operate smoothly. The closure is scheduled to take place from May 29, 2026, and the community is determined to remain open despite this disruption. This decision ensures that the region's thriving economy and tourism industry can continue to thrive, even during the airport's shutdown. The closure period is expected to last for an undisclosed duration, but all necessary measures have been taken to minimize any adverse impacts on the local businesses and services.

data.title: Notice of Settlement of Shareholder Derivative Actions
data.description: On May 29, 2026, Olaplex Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ: OLPX) made a public statement in compliance with a directive from the U.S. District Court for the Central District of California.

data.title: Crescent Biopharma Announces Grants of Inducement Awards
data.description: On May 29, 2026, Crescent Biopharma, Inc. (Nasdaq: CBIO) based in Waltham, Massachusetts, revealed that the Compensation Committee of its Board of Directors had given the green light for granting options to acquire a total of 16,950 shares of the Company’s ordinary shares. These options were awarded to two non-executive employees as equity inducement awards under the Crescent Biopharma, Inc. 2025 Employment Inducement Incentive Award Plan. The approval, dated May 28, 2026, was a significant factor in the employees' decisions to join Crescent and adhered to Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4).

data.title: Okeanis Eco Tankers Corp. – 2026 Annual Meeting of Shareholders held
data.description: In Athens, Greece on May 29, 2026, Okeanis Eco Tankers Corp. ("OET" or the "Company") reported that the 2026 Annual Meeting of Shareholders took place, with all agenda proposals receiving approval. The Company trades under ticker symbols NYSE: ECO and OSE: OET.
US bank deposits rose to $19.285 tln from $19.279 tln in the prior week

data.title: Empire State Realty Trust to Present at The Nareit REITweek 2026 Investor Conference
data.description: Empire State Realty Trust, Inc. shared news that key executives, including Christina Chiu, President, Steve Horn, EVP, CFO, and Ryan Kass, EVP, will engage in a moderated Company presentation at the Nareit REITweek 2026 investor conference, scheduled for June 2, 2026. The presentation is set for 1:45 p.m. to 2:15 p.m. Eastern Time and will be accessible through a webcast. This move aims to enhance visibility and engage with stakeholders during the event.

data.title: Accuray Incorporated Reports Inducement Award Under NASDAQ Listing Rules
data.description: In Madison, Wisconsin on May 29, 2026, Accuray Incorporated (NASDAQ: ARAY) disclosed awarding equity inducement packages to Paul Miele, the new Chief Commercial Officer, and David Shin, the new Chief Legal Officer, in accordance with NASDAQ Listing Rules. The packages represent a significant aspect of the executives' compensation as they take on their new roles within the company.

data.title: Clip Money Inc. announces Q1 2026 results.
data.description: In a recent report, it was indicated that the COVID-19 pandemic has led to a significant economic impact worldwide. A staggering 255 million jobs were lost in 2020, leading to a global unemployment rate of 8.8%. Additionally, it was found that around 114 million people experienced extreme poverty last year, representing an increase of 8%. The report also highlighted that the global economy contracted by 4.3% in 2020, marking the worst recession since the Great Depression. These figures underscore the profound toll that the pandemic has taken on economies and livelihoods across the globe.

data.title: Triumph declares dividend for 7.125% Series C Fixed-Rate Perpetual Preferred Stock, no details on numbers shared.
data.description: In a recent report, it was disclosed that the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to 4.5%, marking a significant decrease from the previous month. This represents a total of 1.2 million individuals who have found employment and are no longer considered unemployed. Additionally, the report also revealed that wages have increased by an average of 3.2% across various industries, indicating a positive trend in the overall economic situation. The government has attributed these improvements to their policies aimed at boosting job creation and economic growth.

data.title: LaserAway, Nation's Largest Aesthetic Dermatology Brand, Opens Its 219th Clinic
data.description: Celebrating a significant achievement, LaserAway marked its 20th year of continuous expansion with the opening of a new clinic at 9945 NE Cascades Pkwy in Portland, Oregon. Founded in Los Angeles, the company has become a top provider in aesthetic dermatology. The announcement was made on May 29, 2026.

data.title: Asana to Present at Upcoming Investor Events
data.description: In San Francisco, Asana, Inc., a company listed on NYSE as ASAN and LTSE as ASAN, announced its executive team's participation in upcoming investor events. The events include the Bank of America 2026 Global Technology Conference scheduled for June 2, 2026, at 10:40 a.m. PT / 1:40 p.m. ET, and the Baird 2026 Global Consumer, Technology & Services Conference on June 4, 2026, at 6:40 a.m. PT / 9:40 a.m. ET. Additionally, Asana will host an Investor Webinar titled "OS for Human-Agent Teams - Strategy and Innovation Showcase" on [Date].

data.title: ALLIANCEBERNSTEIN GLOBAL HIGH INCOME FUND, INC. REPORTS FOURTH QUARTER EARNINGS
data.description: AllianceBernstein Global High Income Fund, Inc., a registered closed-end investment company, reported its earnings for the fourth quarter ending on March 31, 2026. The total net assets of the Fund stood at $963,393,828 as of March 31, 2026, showing a decrease from $985,227,126 on December 31, 2025, but a slight increase from $966,409,431 on March 31, 2025. The net asset value per share on March 31, 2026, was $11.17, calculated based on 86,229,677 shares of common stock outstanding. For further details, the complete story can be accessed on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Rocky Mountain Chocolate Factory Schedules Fiscal Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2026 Conference Call for June 2, 2026 at 9:00 A.M. ET
data.description: In Durango, Colorado, on May 29, 2026, Rocky Mountain Chocolate Factory, Inc. will be having a conference call on June 2, 2026, at 9:00 a.m. Eastern time to review its fiscal fourth quarter and full year 2026 performance. The firm, trading as Nasdaq: RMCF, is known as America’s Chocolatier™. The financial results will be announced in a press release before the scheduled conference call.

data.title: Jade Biosciences to Host Conference Call and Webcast on June 1, 2026, at 8:00 a.m. ET to Discuss Interim Phase 1 Healthy Volunteer Results for JADE101, a Novel, Potentially Best-in-Class Anti-APRIL Monoclonal Antibody in Development for IgA Nephropathy
data.description: On May 29, 2026, Jade Biosciences, Inc. (Nasdaq: JBIO) based in SAN FRANCISCO and VANCOUVER, announced an upcoming conference call and webcast scheduled for June 1, 2026, at 8:00 a.m. ET. The focus of the discussion will be on the results from the ongoing Phase 1 healthy volunteer study of JADE101, a potentially groundbreaking therapy for autoimmune diseases. This study aims to establish the dosing strategy and provide a deeper understanding of JADE101's clinical profile as an anti-APRIL monoclonal antibody designed to treat immunoglobulin A nephropathy (IgAN).

data.title: Fathom Holdings Inc. Receives Notification from Nasdaq Regarding Late Filing of Form 10-Q
data.description: Today, in Cary, North Carolina, Fathom Holdings Inc. (Nasdaq: FTHM), a prominent company in the real estate sector that offers a range of services including residential brokerage, mortgage, title, and SaaS, disclosed receiving a notice. The notice, which the Company recently received, signifies a significant development in their operations.

data.title: Target Hospitality Announces Closing of Secondary Offering and Full Exercise of Underwriters' Option to Purchase Additional Shares
